name: Prawn Corn Dog for Simone Rocha
steps: Make the mix and put it in a piping bag.
Freeze it to make it easier to handle.
Prefry the corn dogs and refry at high temperature when needed.

other_details.notes: Ideally the presentation, half shell cockles all face up around in a circle, with a drape of sauce on top, picked chervile and chicken skin.
